# CommutativityProvider

Determine whether two StoragePrograms commute , meaning they produce the same result regardless of execution order . Enables safe concurrent execution and parallel FlowTrace branch tracing

## Commands

### check
Compare the read and write sets of both programs . If neither 
 program s write set overlaps the other s read or write set , 
 the programs commute . Returns the determination and reasoning .

**Arguments:** `$0` **programA** (string), `$1` **programB** (string), `$2` **readWriteSetsA** (string), `$3` **readWriteSetsB** (string)
